LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Advanced_Equipment.descriptio: Advanced equipment used by Caesar's Legion veterans and centurions.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Advanced_Equipment.label: Legion Advanced Equipment
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Basic_Equipment.description: Basic equipment used by Caesar's Legion recruits and legionaries.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Basic_Equipment.label: Legion Basic Equipment
